coupon.source_phrase_block: This is an e-voucher . Pass is e-mailed to the patron. This library pass entitles you to up to two tickets for Gallery Admission at the discounted Library Pass price of $10 per ticket. Library Passes are not valid for performances, events, or films. This library pass is not a museum admission ticket. After reserving your library pass, follow the emailed instructions on how to reserve your free Gallery Admission tickets.
